heroDescription: Protect your weekly income instantly with AI-powered insurance designed for delivery workers from Swiggy, Zomato, and more.
problemDescription: Delivery workers lose income during heavy rain, pollution, and other disruptions. Traditional insurance is slow and complicated. We make it instant and automatic.
pollutionRiskDesc: High AQI means fewer riders on road
step1Desc: Quick registration with your delivery platform details
step2Desc: Select Normal or Premium coverage based on your needs
step3Desc: Our AI tracks weather, AQI, and demand in real-time
step4Desc: Instant compensation when disruptions are detected
feature1Desc: Advanced AI monitors weather, pollution, and delivery demand to automatically detect disruptions
feature2Desc: No paperwork, no waiting. Claims are automatically triggered and processed in minutes
feature3Desc: Protect up to ₹3000/week with our Premium plan and keep your income stable
ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of delivery workers who trust InsureGig
